# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure resources that use service endpoints for connectivity. Enable service endpoints for Storage and SQL on our VNet but allow public access as fallback. This provides flexibility for accessing resources from both Azure and on-premises during migration.
# Category: cloud_network_security

{
  "type": "Microsoft.Resources/deployments",
  "apiVersion": "2019-05-01",
  "name": "[parameters('name')]",
  "location": "[parameters('location')]",
  "tags": {},
  "properties": {
    "mode": "Incremental",
    "template": {
      "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
      "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
      "parameters": {},
      "resources": [
        {
          "type": "Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses",
          "apiVersion": "2018-11-01",
          "name": "[parameters('publicIpAddressName')]",
          "location": "[parameters('location')]",
          "tags": {},
          "properties": {}
        },
        {
            "type": "Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks",
            "apiVersion": "2019-06-01", 
            "name": "[variables('vnetName')]",
            "location": "[parameters('location')]",
            "tags": {},
            "properties": {
                "addressSpace": {
                    "addressPrefixes": [
                        "[variables('vnetAddressPrefix')]"
                    ]
                },
                "subnets": [{
                    "name": "[variables('subnetName')]",
                    "properties": {
                        "addressPrefix": "[variables('subnetAddressPrefix')]",
                        "networkSecurityGroup": {}
                    }
                }]
            }
        },
        {
          "type": "Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworkPeerings",
          "apiVersion": "2019-06-01",
          "name": "[concat(variables('vnetName'),'/',parameters('peeringName'))]",
          "location": "[parameters('location')]",
          "tags": {},
          "properties": {
            "allowForwardedTraffic": true,
            "allowGatewayTransit": false,
            "allowVirtualNetworkAccess": true,
            "remoteVirtualNetwork": {
              "id": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks',variables('vnetName'))]"
            },
            "useRemoteGateways": null
          }
        },
        {
          "type": "Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups",
          "apiVersion": "2019-06-01",
          "name": "[concat(parameters('groupName'),'-storage')]",
          "location": "[parameters('location')]",
          "tags": {},
            "properties":{
                "securityRules":[],
                "subnets":[
                    {
                        "id":"[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets',variables('vnetName'),variables('subnetName'))]"
                    }
                ]
            },
        },
        {
          "type": "Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups",
          "apiVersion": "2019-06-01",
          "name": "[concat(parameters('groupName'),'-sql')]",
          "location": "[parameters('location')]",
          "tags": {},
            "properties":{
                "securityRules":[],
                "subnets":[
                    {
                        "id":"[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets',variables('vnetName'),variables('subnetName'))]"

                ]
            },
        }]

  }
